question: What is the total ticket expense of the visitors whose membership level is 1?
gold_sql: SELECT sum(t2.Total_spent) FROM visitor AS t1 JOIN visit AS t2 ON t1.id  =  t2.visitor_id WHERE t1.Level_of_membership  =  1
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(T2.num_1) FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.num_1 = 1;
raw_response: SELECT SUM(T2.num_1) FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T3.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.num_1 = 1;
